future_trainable_model: open/small model fork through HUD Training
required_validation_before_training: Run group rollouts on GDPval variants and autonomous-business variants.
Confirm within-group reward spread; all-one or all-zero groups do not train.
Run QA Evaluator Teacher on selected successes and failures.
Exclude held-out board exam traces from SFT/RL data.
Only fork/train after reward spread and task diversity are proven.
notes: Prompt-only improvement to produce more teachable traces.
Do not claim PhD/RL completion until HUD Training produces a real checkpoint.
The first trainable fork should be evaluated against dr-atlas-v0 and Ledger-2 on held-out tasks.
